meta.tagline: Institutions, healthcare aur business ke liye enterprise software.
meta.description: Cubico Technologies Pakistan ke institutions, healthcare providers aur barhti businesses ke liye enterprise-grade software banati hai.

home.heroTitle: Aisa software jo aap ke business ko aagay barhaye
home.heroSubtitle: Hospital management se le kar e-commerce website tak — aik aisi team jo waqai cheezain deliver karti hai.
home.trustStrip: 50+ teams ka bharosa · Pakistan · UAE · UK · USA
home.videoComingSoon: video jald hi aa rahi hai

footer.brandDesc: Websites, portals, CRMs aur marketing — duniya bhar ke businesses ke liye banaye gaye.

templates.metaDescription: Humari mukammal website templates ki library dekhein. Har industry, har style. Kisi bhi template par click karein live preview ke liye, phir minute mein apna project shuru karein.
templates.heroSubtitle: Aik starting point chunein. Har template working homepage aur supporting pages ke saath aati hai — baaqi hum customize kar dete hain.
templates.searchPlaceholder: Name, industry, ya tag se dhoondein…
templates.emptyTitle: "{query}" se koi template match nahi hua
templates.footerHintQuestion: Jo aap chahtay hain woh nahi mil raha?
templates.footerHintCta: Humein batayein kya chahiye — hum bana denge

service.featuresTitle: Har woh cheez jo aap ko chahiye
service.featuresSubtitle: Built-in features jo har workflow ko cover karte hain — box se nikaltay hi.
service.pricingSubtitle: Koi hidden fees nahi. Kabhi bhi cancel ya upgrade karein.
service.planWhatsappMessage: Salaam, mujhe {service} ke {plan} plan ke baaray mein mazeed jaannay mein dilchaspi hai
service.ctaReadySubtitle: Humein WhatsApp par message karein — hum aap ko mahinoon nahi, dinoon mein chala denge.

webdev.heroSubtitle: Koi templates se lartay nahi. Koi hamesha ki subscription nahi. Koi aisa freelancer nahi jo ghaib ho jaye. Sirf aik team jo banati hai, launch karti hai, aur saath rehti hai.
webdev.templatesSubtitle: Har industry. Har style. Click karke live preview dekhein.
webdev.modalStickyCta: Yeh Template Chunein — Apni Website Banwayen

webPricing.title: Saada, shafaaf pricing
webPricing.subtitle: Woh plan chunein jo aap ki zaroorat ke mutabiq ho. Har plan mein colour psychology principles ke saath brand-oriented design shamil hai.
webPricing.detecting: Aap ki location detect ho rahi hai...
webPricing.pricesInPkr: Prices PKR (Pakistan) mein dikhaye ja rahe hain
webPricing.pricesInUsd: Prices USD (International) mein dikhaye ja rahe hain
webPricing.ecommerceNote: E-commerce functionality: development cost mein +{amount} add hoga
webPricing.supportNote: Starter plan mein delivery ke baad 3 mahinon ki free adjustments shamil hain. Growth aur Professional plans mein jab tak aap subscribed hain continuous support aur updates milte hain.

professional.subtitle: Domain aur hosting dono hum dekhte hain

login.signInTitle: Apnay account mein sign in karein
login.successSignUp: Account ban gaya! Confirm karnay ke liye apna email check karein, phir log in karein.
login.terms: Aagay barh kar, aap Cubico ki Terms of Service se mutafiq hain.

order.chooseTemplateSub: Apni industry se sab se qareebi wala chunein. Hum sab customize kar denge.
order.aboutBusinessSub: Sirf basic cheezain — baaqi hum mil kar samajh lenge.
order.labelBusinessDesc: Aap ka business kya karta hai? (2-3 jumlay)
order.assetsSub: Sab optional hai — jo nahi hai woh chhor dein.
order.logoUploadText: Apna logo upload karein (PNG, SVG, JPG)
order.letTeamDecide: Humari team ko behtar rang chunne dein
order.placeholderColors: Maslan: Neela aur safed, meray logo se match, earthy tones
order.labelReferences: Woh websites jo aap ko pasand hain (optional)
order.placeholderReferences: Jo bhi website design aap ko pasand ho uska URL paste karein...
order.contactTitle: Hum Aap Se Kaise Raabta Karein?
order.contactSub: Humein kam az kam aik tareeqa chahiye aap se raabta ka.
order.pickPlanSub: Jo aap ke liye theek ho — baad mein upgrade bhi kar saktay hain.
order.detecting: Aap ki location detect ho rahi hai…
order.pricingNote: International pricing PKR se auto-convert hoti hai. Final invoice upar dikhaye gaye currency mein hogi.
order.reviewSub: Sab kuch theek lage, toh submit karein. Baad mein developer se chat mein kuch bhi badal saktay hain.
whatsNextItems: Aap ke project par foran aik developer lagaya jata hai
Aap ko ghanton mein live preview link milega
Apnay dashboard se kabhi bhi developer se chat karein
Sirf tab pay karein jab aap khush hon — poori ownership, koi lock-in nahi
order.authSubtitle: Order track karnay aur developer se chat karnay ke liye quick account.
order.authConfirmEmail: Confirm karnay ke liye apna email check karein, phir wapas aa kar log in karein.
